title: esenbeckia grandiflora
intro: Esenbeckia grandiflora, also known as 'Cascabela', is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Esenbeckia grandiflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from bronchitis and asthma symptoms. Esenbeckia grandiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
